DEADCELLS-BEHEADED.aromaPrinciple: [sine][red]Soon, you'll remember what pain feels like.[/red][/sine]
DEADCELLS-BEHEADED.cardsModifierDescript: Dead Cells cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
DEADCELLS-BEHEADED.description:
A weird thing parasitizing a corpse.
It never stays still, and it never runs out of ways to cut down anything in its path.
DEADCELLS-BEHEADED.eventDeathPrevention: Yeah, figures this still isn't over.
DEADCELLS-BEHEADED.title: The Beheaded
